/cwe/weakness/1121.Name: Excessive McCabe Cyclomatic Complexity
/cwe/weakness/1121.Description:
The code contains McCabe cyclomatic complexity that exceeds a
	desirable maximum.
/cwe/weakness/1121.ExtendedDescription: This issue makes it more difficult to understand and/or maintain the product, which indirectly affects security by making it more difficult or time-consuming to find and/or fix vulnerabilities. It also might make it easier to introduce vulnerabilities.
